changes.summary: C2 now executes pnpm ci:db-smoke with CI_REQUIRE_DB_SMOKE=true instead of accepting a text reference to pnpm test:db.
Runs proof-auditor-gate.ts with --require-executed-command "pnpm test:db" so proof bundles must include captured node:test execution evidence.
Adds an opt-in required executed command check that requires node:test output with pass count, fail 0, and skipped 0.
Adds regression tests for missing command evidence, string-only DB proof rejection, skipped TAP rejection, and captured TAP proof acceptance.

verification.output: Verdict: PASS; Changed files: 16; Rules matched: (none) - no R-level artifacts required for this diff
